name: Sudan
headline: Sudan FLOOR-STATE CONFIRMATION at 0.0 / Critical. IPC May 14: 20M Sudanese facing acute hunger; 800K children risk severe malnutrition. Famine thresholds surpassed in additional Darfur towns (Um Baru, Kernoi in North Darfur); 14 areas at risk of famine; 135K facing 'catastrophic' hunger. UN May 14: hunger crisis deepens as lean season (June-September) approaches. 9M internally displaced. Both warring parties (SAF + RSF) continue obstructing humanitarian access. Floor sustained.

EQU.rationale: Floor sustained. 20M acute hunger; 800K children at severe malnutrition risk.

BND.rationale: Floor sustained. Famine-as-conduct (siege/starvation in Darfur); both parties (SAF + RSF) obstructing humanitarian access. Lean-season trajectory points to mass-mortality escalation.

evidence.finding: IPC May 14: 20M acute hunger; 800K children at severe malnutrition risk. 14 areas at famine risk. 135K facing 'catastrophic' hunger.
UN May: hunger crisis deepens as lean season (June-September) approaches.
Famine conditions confirmed in Al Fasher and Kadugli; risk of famine in 20+ areas across Greater Darfur and Greater Kordofan. Famine thresholds surpassed in Um Baru and Kernoi (North Darfur).
Fourth year of war; El-Fasher fell to RSF in October 2025 after 18 months of bombardment and starvation, displacing 127K. 9M total displaced.

keyEvidence: IPC May 14: 20M acute hunger; 800K children at severe malnutrition risk.
Famine thresholds surpassed in Um Baru and Kernoi (North Darfur).
rationale: Floor confirmation at 0.0. IPC May 14 catastrophic-hunger documentation (135K at IPC Phase 5) and lean-season trajectory sustain the canonical floor anchor (famine-as-conduct, both parties obstructing humanitarian access). Already at floor, no downward movement available. Math: 8/8 = 1.0 → ((1.0-1)/4)*100 = 0.0.
whyHeadline: Sudan floor sustained; 20M acute hunger, 135K catastrophic; lean-season mass-mortality trajectory approaches.

dominantDimension.note: EQU and BND co-anchor floor (famine-as-conduct with child-malnutrition extreme).

boundaryWatchResolution: Floor state; no boundary movement available.
disclaimer: This assessment is based on publicly available information and does not constitute a formal Compassion Benchmark Certified Assessment.
